form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 7th of 9 at Wolverhampton on March 17 over 1000m, 5 len behind Temple Of Athena carrying 57kg at $41. Second run from a spell 5th of 8 at Wolverhampton on March 31 over 1000m, 4 len behind Simplify carrying 56kg at $23. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign by 1.5 len Wolverhampton October 20 over 1000m defeating Visually carrying 56.5kg at $3.50. First up last campaign second of 11 at this track September 27 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Siouxpersonic with 57kg at $5. All set for a bright return.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start won by a head at Newcastle All Weather March 21 over 1200m defeating Cool Molly with 61kg at $7.50. Before that won by 1.5 len at this track February 28 over 1000m defeating Call Margot carrying 57kg at $17. Well placed and sure to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track March 13 over 1000m defeating Von Trotter carrying 56kg at $3.10. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Wolverhampton on November 8 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Zighy carrying 58kg at $4. Fitter and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of seven months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at this track September 2 over 1000m, 7 len behind Tanjen carrying 60.5kg at $4.30. First up last campaign fifth of 8 at Doncaster July 10 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Mystical Storm with 56kg at $29. Capable of a bold showing.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 40 days. Resuming eased back early on 5th of 7 at this track on January 23 over 1000m, 6 len behind Ambishio carrying 56kg at $29. Last start 2nd of 7 at this track on February 28 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Alfa Duplicate with 61kg at $9. The maiden win looks imminent.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at Lingfield All Weather on February 12 over 1000m, 9 len behind Henrythenate carrying 61kg at $34. Second-up second last of 9 at Wolverhampton on March 13 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Wisetanck carrying 60.5kg at $51. Has ability but prefer to see a bit more at this stage.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 7 at Lingfield All Weather on March 25 over 1200m, 5 len behind Autumn Affair carrying 58.5kg at $10. Before that ran last of 7 at Wolverhampton on February 17 over 1020m, 13 len behind Baker Blue carrying 56.5kg at $4.30. Must be respected.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months won by 2.25 len at Wolverhampton March 31 over 1000m defeating Overbudget with 58kg at $13.
